title: forsythia suspensa var. variegata
intro: Forsythia suspensa var. variegata, also known as variegated flos lutei or yellow flos lutei, is a plant species within the family Oleaceae, native to China and used in traditional medicine. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antitumor activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Forsythia suspensa var. variegata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects, while also being used to treat various gastrointestinal and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Forsythia suspensa var. variegata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
